primaryName: New Hope Free Methodist Church (Immigration Legal Services)

webVerification.sourceLabel: New Hope Free Methodist Church Immigration Legal Services page
webVerification.notes: Web confirms (585) 244-4000 as the main church phone for New Hope Free Methodist; the immigration clinic specifically directs new clients to text 585-760-4328 or email immigration@newhopefree.org. The main number is the legitimate fallback for the program.
